sourcesContent:
import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { ShieldCheck, Activity, Lock, BarChart3, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react"; import { Button } from "../components/ui/button"; import { Card } from "../components/ui/card"; const LandingPage = () => { return (
{/* Navigation */}
Sentinel AI
Home About Contact
{/* Hero Section */}

Online Payment Fraud Detection System

Detect fraudulent transactions in real-time using advanced Machine Learning algorithms. Protect your business with bank-grade security and precision analytics.

Real-time Detection
98% Accuracy
{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

Three simple steps to detect fraud with precision

1

Input Transaction

Enter transaction details including amount, time step, and account balances through our secure form.

2

ML Analysis

Our Random Forest and Logistic Regression models analyze patterns and anomalies in milliseconds.

3

Get Results

Receive instant fraud prediction with risk score, confidence level, and detailed explanation.

{/* Technology Stack */}

Technology Stack

Built with cutting-edge technologies for maximum reliability

{[ { name: 'FastAPI', desc: 'High-performance backend' }, { name: 'React', desc: 'Modern UI framework' }, { name: 'MongoDB', desc: 'Scalable database' }, { name: 'scikit-learn', desc: 'ML algorithms' }, { name: 'Random Forest', desc: 'Primary ML model' }, { name: 'Logistic Regression', desc: 'Secondary model' }, { name: 'Pandas', desc: 'Data processing' }, { name: 'NumPy', desc: 'Numerical computing' }, ].map((tech, idx) => (

{tech.name}

{tech.desc}

 ))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Secure Your Transactions?

Start detecting fraud in real-time with our ML-powered system

{/* Footer */}
Sentinel AI

Advanced Machine Learning for fraud detection

Quick Links

Home Check Transaction About Contact

Academic Project

Built for educational purposes

© 2025 Sentinel AI. All rights reserved.

); }; export default LandingPage;
